== Trivia ==
The visual design of {{R|Cursed Pearl||2}} resembles a black pearl and is likely a reference to the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Pearl_of_Death Pearl of Death], a Sherlock Holmes movie, where the final conflict revolves around a pearl.

"No more than a symbol of the greed and cruelty and lust for power that have set men at each other's throats down through the centuries... and the struggle will go on, Watson, for a pearl... kingdom... perhaps even world dominion... till the greed and cruelty have burned out of every last one of us... and when that time comes... perhaps even the pearl... will be washed clean again."<ref>[https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0037168/quotes/ IMDB Quotes]</ref>
